item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
kinda want that now
he cloned himself 4 times and formed a human tower! impressive
quite jealous
we've all been there
mmm hmm
i like it
this is all i'm going to think about now
finally
there really is no other way to describe it
i think he's forgetting about 80s-90s action movies
pegin fit in hands
only in dreams
it's called fashion Brenda
what if we kissed at the end
i kept looking in the corners, took a little while
those patrons have it made
that's my time.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Just a good ol random dump
item.dc:creator: rdwthomas

item.title: Have a dump of the freshest possible memes and clippings from around the internet
item.description:
I absolutely love when natures sites are on social media like this. Hate it when corporations do it but with them it's so fun.
"Behold, a man!" applies still today.
At least it wasn't Lady from Lady and the Tramp
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RRKJiM9Njr8 and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YRPBUeVOimU are the songs
That listing might be "normal for the patient"
The only penne I've ever seen is a mix between the two, it's ridged but only with longitudinal ridges, only thick sauces (like roux) stick to it, no tomato sauces would.
This was me most of the week, except it was any two noises at all, even ones I liked.
TIL there ever was an original
item.dc:creator: bobismeisbob

item.title: shit products
item.description: $80 shoes, start to fall after three mo, electric fan new one every year, can opener, three in a year, $20 toaster six months, nice belt 3mo, wtf is everything shit?
item.dc:creator: DunkinBaskin

item.title: Executive function for once.
item.description: Actually got the living room completely clean, the kitchen except dishes which are soaking and my roommate will do now that I've cleaned the sinks. Now working on my bedroom that I got half way through a month or so ago. I know none of it will last, but it feels good to finally be able to do chores. The closest I've come to taking a break is sitting on the arm of the couch to eat twice. Edit: 18 hours total before I made myself sick pushing too hard. Pushed half the trash farther under my bed, but the visible floor is clean except for the dirty laundry pile. That's next on my list assuming my kids don't push anything else to the top before I get to it. Hopefully I'll be able to take a bite out of that during the week. This is my Sunday, and I'm just hoping to recover enough that I don't have to call out of work. Thanks for the support everyone.
item.dc:creator: jasondeslin

item.title: I'll give it a shot
item.description: I left the country, but my family is in touch with me. They still wear hijabs, even at home with the family. I hope they will not be criticising me on the video for not wearing a hijab, but it won't be a surprise. It's a country where something can get viral very easily if one spreads hatred regarding my "outfit". if you're interested, this is the video https://youtu.be/eq5A-vfIjis I wrote this during COVID lockdown, and felt like it was the end of the world lol. (I messed up an earlier post, reposted it!) edit: wow! the amount of support from here is shocking, it's so humbling to know there is still kindness in this world, thank you so much everyone. It's so encouraging for me to keep sharing my music. I will not forget this moment. (originally posted by @here4smiles on 2023-07-07 07:48:02)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Damn, Nature, you bottom shelf.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Taxi Bear and Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Project 2025
item.description: https://x.com/adgirlMM/status/1809359066810204630 If common decency and basic sanity won’t work you can always appeal to people’s selfishness instead. Trump has disavowed project 2025, which means he’s fully on board with it and will implement it if returned to power. You can also tell how rattled about this the maga Christian nationalists are by the amount of lying disingenuous trolls there are swarming the comments section in there. Last night I even had one on one of my other posts here on imgur. Note: I deleted an earlier version of this post because it wasn’t cropped right.

item.title: Chicken Shawarma
item.description: 1 tablespoon corriander 1 tablespoon cayenne pepper 1 tablespoon cardamon 1 tablespoon smoked paprika 1 tablespoon ground cumin 1 tablespoon Cinnamon 1 tsp black pepper 1 teaspoon of salt Sour cream Olive oil 2 garlic cloves, pressed 1/2 lemon, the juice About 1.5-2kg chicken breasts Shawarma Sauce: 1 cup plain yogurt ¼ cup mayonnaise 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice 1 garlic clove, grated Olive oil parsley For 8 Pira bread: 2.5 dl lukewarm water 2/3 pk dry yeast 2 teaspoons of sugar 400 g wheat flour 1 dl Greek yogurt 1 teaspoon of salt 4 tbsp olive oil Source: skrapatallerken / ninamathea
item.dc:creator: HotCoffee9520

item.title: Everybody needs a little time away - meme dump vol 149
item.dc:creator: HileyNoteson

item.title: I Adopted an “Unadoptable” Dog. Story In The Comments
item.description:
Let me introduce you to this “killer”. Stormie was surrendered last year (2023) and her previous owners said she should absolutely not be adopted out. They claimed she was aggressive and even accused her of viciously killing another pet in their home (while they were not home and did not observe the behavior).
They also said all other dogs in the home were fixed. My sister-in-law, who is a vet tech, noted that very soon after surrendering Stormie, the same people brought an un-fixed adult male dog to her veterinary practice for vaccines (not to be fixed). It seems worth noting.
My brother, sister-in-law, and I all foster animals when we can. My SIL brought Stormie home. My brother, SIL, and my 2y/o neice all lived with Stormie for 3 months. Stormie and my neice loved(!) looking out the window together.
I have indoor cats and outdoor ducks.
My brother texted me to say he thought Stormie would fit in perfectly. . .
. . . and boy does she.
She is very chill with the indoor cats.
She catches healthy scraps from my dinners, and never steals anything from the kitties (who also get some small bites).
She’s stinkin cute.
She hangs out with my ducks.
Stormie and Raffi Duck sharing peas.
Raffi feels safest following Stormie around
BFFs
I’ve had her home for 8 months now, and she is honestly the very best.
Moral of the Story: People suck. Dogs are awesome. Don’t trust everything you hear. #adoptdontshop #theyreallgooddogsbrent #killer
item.dc:creator: thatsmeinanutshell

item.title: Chatty kitties part 13
item.description:
Please, check your WiFi (aka. wireless fireless).
Just kidding; I know it's wireless fisting.
Anyway, enjoy the kitty cats.

item.dc:creator: binkyningy

item.title: Roman Engineering.
item.description: No, this is NOT an AI image. This is the massive Segovia Aqueduct, built during the reign of Emperor Trajan between 98 and 117 AD, which is a testament to the ingenuity of Roman engineering. Remarkably preserved, this monumental structure spans 727 meters and rises with 165 arches, each exceeding 9 meters in height. Uniquely, it is assembled from blocks of dark Guadarrama granite, laid without mortar, demonstrating the precision and durability of ancient Roman construction techniques.
item.dc:creator: Marco1959Collodi

item.title: Well, it was nice while it lasted...
item.description:
Hey imgur! Now that I've finally finished moving house (and also the birthday streamathon (see below)), I'm back! HOW HAVE THINGS BEEN?
Had a birthday streamathon to catch up on all the streams I've missed which lasted 39 hours https://twitch.tv/loadingartist
item.dc:creator: loadingartist
